topics.topic_en: Yoon Appeal Court Raises Sentence to 7 Years
topics.summary: On April 29, the Seoul High Court increased former President Yoon Suk-yeol's sentence from five to seven years in prison after finding him guilty of additional charges including obstruction of arrest, abuse of power, and disseminating false information to foreign media during the martial law crisis. Yoon's legal team announced plans to appeal to the Supreme Court.

evidence_headlines.title: South Korean court increases ex-president Yoon's sentence for obstructing justice
Appeals court raises Yoon's term to 7 years over obstruction of duty charges
'체포 방해' 윤석열 항소심 징역 7년…1심보다 늘어

topics.topic_en: PPP Leadership Crisis Ahead of June Elections
topics.summary: With 40 days until the June 3 local elections, People Power Party leader Jang Dong-hyeok faces mounting resignation calls from within the party, as regional candidates distance themselves and consider independent campaign committees. Polls show DPK leading PPP by roughly 51% to 31%, with the PPP struggling to finalize candidates for key mayoral races.

evidence_headlines.title: [정치] 지방선거 앞 '장동혁 사퇴론'...혼란의 국민의힘
Main opposition party struggles to find June election candidates, bringing back old guards
'張 블랙홀' 빠진 국힘…독자 선대위 꺼내는 국힘 후보들

topics.topic_en: June 3 Local and By-Elections Campaign Dynamics
topics.summary: The June 3 nationwide local elections and simultaneous by-elections are entering the final campaign stretch, with the ruling Democratic Party of Korea holding a dominant lead in polling. Notable contests include key Seoul and Busan mayoral races, and by-elections in multiple constituencies vacated by lawmakers who joined the Lee government.

evidence_headlines.title: 2026년 재보궐선거 선거 실시 지역
2026 South Korean Local Elections: Party Winner Prediction
Opposition Candidates Distance Themselves from Party Leader Chang

topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung delivered a parliamentary address urging the National Assembly to swiftly pass a 26.2 trillion won ($17.1 billion) supplementary budget designed to cushion the domestic economy from the energy shock caused by the ongoing Middle East war. Lee called the situation the worst threat to Korea's energy security and appealed for bipartisan cooperation.

evidence_headlines.title: 이재명 대통령 '비상 상황에 비상한 대책' 26.2조 원 추경 시정연설
President Lee urges quick approval of supplementary budget bill
Lee urges swift extra budget passage, says speed is key in Mideast crisis

topics.topic_en: Middle East War Energy Shock on Korean Economy
topics.topic_ko: 중동 전쟁發 에너지 위기와 한국 경제 영향
topics.summary: The ongoing Middle East conflict has triggered a historic global oil supply disruption, with Korea — heavily dependent on Gulf energy imports — identified as among the most exposed economies. The government's emergency oil procurement and fiscal response measures have become a central policy battleground.

evidence_headlines.title: Middle East war: 6 ways countries are responding to the historic energy shock
"호르무즈 해협 차단, 역사상 최대 에너지 위기"…한국, 가장 먼저 직격탄
이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고…중동 위기 속 원유 대량 확보 등 경제 대응 평가

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Approval Rating at Post-Inauguration High
topics.topic_ko: 이재명 대통령 국정지지율 취임 후 최고치
topics.summary: Multiple polling firms recorded President Lee Jae-myung's approval rating at 65–67% in mid-to-late April 2026, the highest since his inauguration, driven largely by the government's economic crisis management response to the Middle East energy shock. The Democratic Party of Korea's own rating stands around 48–51%, widening its lead over the PPP.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고…민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
이재명 대통령 지지율 67%…민주당 48% 2주 연속 최고치
이재명 지지율 67% 견고한 전국 지지층 결집 (한국갤럽 4.24)

topics.topic_en: Sejong Administrative Capital Bill Stalled in Assembly
topics.topic_ko: 행정수도 세종 특별법 국회 소위 보류
topics.summary: Legislation to legally designate Sejong as the full administrative capital of South Korea failed to clear a National Assembly subcommittee on April 22 amid constitutional concerns, with the vote deferred to April 30 and a public hearing now confirmed for May 7. The bill is a flagship Lee government initiative.

evidence_headlines.title: 행정수도특별법 통과 불발…국회 국토소위서 발목
당정청, '균형성장 입법과제' 논의…국토위, 행정수도특별법 공청회 열 듯
행정수도특별법 공청회 5월 7일 확정…마지막 관문 넘을까

topics.topic_en: US-Korea Tariff Deal Implementation and Uncertainty
topics.topic_ko: 한미 관세 협상 이행 및 통상 불확실성
topics.summary: South Korea's 15% mutual tariff deal struck with the Trump administration in 2025 remains under scrutiny as implementation of sector-specific tariffs on semiconductors, pharmaceuticals, and autos continues to be negotiated. President Lee and the National Assembly are pursuing a bipartisan approach to solidify the trade relationship and protect key export industries.

evidence_headlines.title: U.S. Tariff Actions and U.S.-South Korea Trade
South Korea's Parliament Mounts Rare Bipartisan Effort to Avert US Tariffs
Trump, South Korea's new president agree to make a deal on tariffs

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
